lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Summon Heroes Codes
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Track the latest Summon Heroes codes for Gems, Mythic Shards, Summon Tickets, and Legendary Crystals. Redeem codes first before spending any premium resources.

steps.title: Open Summon Heroes in Roblox
steps.description: Launch Summon Heroes and finish the opening tutorial so every menu is unlocked.

steps.title: Go to the Codes panel near Summon
steps.description: Open the code entry panel from the Summon interface on the right side.

steps.title: Paste an active Summon Heroes code
steps.description: Enter each code exactly as shown, including uppercase letters.

steps.title: Press Claim and confirm rewards
steps.description: Rewards are delivered instantly to your Summon Heroes inventory when the code is valid.

quickTips: Prioritize high-value codes that grant Summon Tickets or Legendary Crystals.
Use new Summon Heroes codes immediately after updates because expiration windows can be short.
Keep an archive of expired Summon Heroes codes to avoid duplicate attempts.
Redeem all active Summon Heroes codes before banner pulling to maximize early value.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Summon Heroes Tier List
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: This Summon Heroes tier list separates overall strength and mode-specific value so you can invest in units that stay strong across progression, PvP, and Tournament.

cards.name: SS Tier Summon Heroes Units
cards.description: Reaper, Emperor, Seraph, B-4:R B.E.T, and Divine are top-value anchors for long-term accounts.

cards.name: S Tier Summon Heroes Units
cards.description: Jester, Sniper, Technomancer, Kitsune Mage, Mermaid, Abyss Lord, and Demon Knight provide excellent multi-mode performance.

cards.name: A Tier Summon Heroes Units
cards.description: Bear Tamer, Laser Cyborg, Slime Summoner, Demon Hunter, Necromancer, Ice Mage, and Spellblade are reliable progression picks.

cards.name: B-C Tier Summon Heroes Units
cards.description: Use these units as temporary roster fillers while saving resources for high-impact banners.

milestones: Summon Heroes PvE leaders: Divine, Matriarch, Reaper
Summon Heroes PvP leaders: B-4:R B.E.T, Seraph, Divine
Summon Heroes Tournament leaders: Emperor, Sniper, Ranger
Update this Summon Heroes tier list after each balance patch

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Summon Heroes Dungeons and Raids Guide
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: Use this Summon Heroes Dungeons and Raids guide to choose entries, rewards, and rotation priorities.

faqs.question: Which Summon Heroes Dungeon should I run first each day?
faqs.answer: Start with the Summon Heroes Dungeon that drops your current bottleneck resource, then spend remaining entries on universal upgrade materials.

faqs.question: How do Summon Heroes Raid rewards compare to Dungeons?
faqs.answer: Summon Heroes Raids usually provide higher peak rewards per clear but require stronger teams and cleaner execution.

faqs.question: What is the best Summon Heroes stamina split?
faqs.answer: Use a balanced Summon Heroes split: progression stages first, then Dungeon or Raid farming for the resources you are short on.

faqs.question: Should new players skip Summon Heroes Raids?
faqs.answer: New Summon Heroes accounts should clear basic Dungeon milestones first, then enter Raids once core units are stable.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate Summon Heroes Dungeon targets?
faqs.answer: Rotate Summon Heroes Dungeon targets whenever a resource reaches surplus or your upgrade focus changes.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Summon Heroes Upgrade Guide
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: This Summon Heroes upgrade guide keeps resource spending efficient from early to endgame.

faqs.question: What is the first Summon Heroes upgrade priority?
faqs.answer: Upgrade your main Summon Heroes carry first, then the frontline and key support unit that enables it.

faqs.question: How should I handle duplicate Summon Heroes units?
faqs.answer: Use Summon Heroes duplicates on units that unlock clear power spikes, not on temporary roster fillers.

faqs.question: When should I start rerolling Summon Heroes traits?
faqs.answer: Begin Summon Heroes trait rerolls after your primary team reaches stable clear thresholds.

faqs.question: Should I spread Summon Heroes materials across multiple teams?
faqs.answer: In early Summon Heroes progression, focus one main team and only expand when mode requirements demand it.

faqs.question: How do I avoid waste in Summon Heroes upgrades?
faqs.answer: Set a Summon Heroes upgrade plan per mode and stop investing when a unit is about to be replaced.

faq.title: Summon Heroes
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common Summon Heroes progression questions

questions.question: How often are Summon Heroes codes updated?
questions.answer: Summon Heroes codes usually refresh around updates, milestones, and events, so check code lists after each patch window.

questions.question: What should I prioritize first in Summon Heroes?
questions.answer: In Summon Heroes, prioritize active code redemption, one focused core team, and Story progress before broad roster spending.

questions.question: How do I spend Gems efficiently in Summon Heroes?
questions.answer: Use Summon Heroes Gems on high-value featured banners and avoid low-impact pulls that do not improve your main mode.

questions.question: Which modes matter most for Summon Heroes endgame growth?
questions.answer: Summon Heroes endgame progression depends on coordinated Story clears, Dungeon farming, PvP practice, and Tournament optimization.

questions.question: How should I build teams for Summon Heroes PvP and Tournament?
questions.answer: Summon Heroes PvP teams need burst and control, while Summon Heroes Tournament teams favor consistent auto-battle output.

questions.question: Where can I follow official Summon Heroes announcements?
questions.answer: Use the official Summon Heroes Hub, Discord, X, and YouTube channels for banners, updates, and event timing.
